content.problemStatement:
A cat wants to climb across a series of **n rooftop platforms**. You are given an integer array **heights**, where heights[i]heights[i]heights[i] represents the height of the i-th rooftop. The cat can jump from rooftop iii to any rooftop jjj such that i<j≤i+ki < j \leq i + ki<j≤i+k.

The energy required to jump from rooftop iii to rooftop jjj is:

∣heights[i]−heights[j]∣|heights[i] - heights[j]|∣heights[i]−heights[j]∣

Your task is to compute the **minimum total energy** the cat needs to reach from **rooftop 0** to **rooftop n-1**.

The cat is initially at step 0.Function DeclarationFunction NameminimumEnergyToReachLastRooftopminimumEnergyToReachLastRooftopminimumEnergyToReachLastRooftop – This function calculates the minimum energy required for the cat to travel from the first rooftop to the last rooftop by making jumps of at most distance kkk.

Parameters
nnn : The number of rooftops.
kkk : The maximum distance (number of rooftops ahead) the cat can jump in a single move.
heightsheightsheights : An array of integers where heights[i]heights[i]heights[i] represents the height of the ithi^\text{th}ith rooftop.
Return Value
Returns a number representing the minimum energy required for the cat to reach rooftop n−1n-1n−1 from rooftop 000.
Constraints
1≤T≤5001 \leq T \leq 5001≤T≤500
1≤n≤1041 \leq n \leq 10^41≤n≤104
1≤k≤101 \leq k \leq 101≤k≤10
0≤heights[i]≤1040 \leq heights[i] \leq 10^40≤heights[i]≤104

Input Format


The first line contains a single integer TTT — the number of test cases.




For each test case:



The first line contains two integers:
nnn — number of rooftops
kkk — maximum jump distance
The second line contains nnn integers representing the array heightsheightsheights.




Output Format
For each test case, print a single integer — the **minimum energy** required for the cat to reach the final rooftop.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test Case 1
Cat jumps: 
0 -> 2 (cost = |10 ? 20| = 10) 
2 -> 4 (cost = |20 ? 15| = 5) 
Total = 15
Test Case 2
Best jumps: 
0 -> 3 (cost = |15 ? 14| = 1) 
3 -> 4 (cost = |14 ? 15| = 1) 
Total = 2
